turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: we all live in a yellow submarine , a yellow submarine . morning !

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: hi ! that is a great line for my next stand up .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: lol . i am shy , anything to break the ice , and i am a beatles fan .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i can tell . i am not , you can see me in some tv shows

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: really ? what shows ? i like tv , it makes me forget i do not like my family

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: wow , i wish i had a big family . i grew up in a very small town .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i did too . i do not get along with mine . they have no class .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: just drink some cola with rum and you'll forget about them !

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: put the lime in the coconut as well . . .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: nah , plain cuba libre , that's what we drank yesterday at the theater .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i prefer mojitos . watermelon or cucumber .
